DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS MOOT AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. IT APPEARS THAT RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED TO THE SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AT ISSUE THEREBY MAKING THE MOTION TO COMPEL MOOT. AFTER REVIEWING THE CHRONOLOGY OF THIS DISCOVERY, THE COURT DENIES THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS.PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Petition For Approval Of Settlement Of Pending Action Compromising Claim Of Estate Of Deceased Minor
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Settlement of Pending Action Compromising Claim of Estate of Deceased Minor.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Giselle Casey, CSR 8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768.

Joseph H. Wood, Esq. appeared for petitioner/plaintiff Estate of Edard Matthew Ryzhenko.
No other appearances.

On the basis of the evidence received, and good cause appearing, the request is granted and the settlement is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $65,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $21,666.67.
Costs - Reimbursement Payable to: Leonid Ryzhenko, 175 21st Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94121.
